ability: Reveal 1 cheer from your cheer deck and send it to your holomem with #Painting. Then, shuffle the cheer deck. Then, return 1 holomem with #Painting from your archive to hand.

name: Bloom Stage
ability: Draw 2 cards. Then, if your Life is 4 or less, bloom 1 of your 1st holomem that bloomed from Debut this turn once more using a holomem from your hand.

name: hololive Generation 1
ability: This card can only be used if you have 6 or less cards in hand excluding this card. Look at the top 4 cards of your deck. Reveal any number of holomem with #Gen1 from among them, and add the revealed holomem to hand. Then, return the remaining cards to the bottom of the deck in any order.

name: Mayonnaise sip sip
ability: During this turn, 1 of your <Hakui Koyori> gets Arts+30.

name: YamadaLui54Sen
ability: This card can only be used if all holomem on your stage have #HoloX. Reveal 2 holomem with #HoloX from your deck, and add them to hand. Then, shuffle the deck. Then, if you have fewer cheers on stage than your opponent, you may send the top card of your cheer deck to your holomem.

name: Workout
ability: This card can only be used if you have a collab holomem, or your opponent has no collab holomem. During this turn, 1 of your holomem gets Arts+20. If that holomem is a Buzz holomem or 2nd holomem, that holomem gets Arts+50 instead.

name: IDENTIFY -AREA 15-
ability: This card can only be used if all holomem on your stage have #IDGen1. Reveal 2 holomem with #IDGen1 from your deck, and add them to hand. Then, shuffle the deck. Then, if there are 0 cards in your cheer deck, during this turn, when your holomem with #IDGen1 downs your opponent's center holomem, your opponent gets life-1.

name: The two of us are LAMBDUCK!
ability: Choose 1 each of your [<Tsunomaki Watame> and <Oozora Subaru>]. Send 1 cheer from your archive to each of the chosen holomem. Then, during this turn, the chosen holomem get Arts+20.

name: Cute Varsity Jacket
ability: ◆Additional ability if attached to a Buzz holomem ■The holomem this tool is attached to gets +30 HP. ■During your opponent's Main Phase, the HP of the holomem this tool is attached to cannot be changed or reduced by your opponent's abilities. Only 1 tool can be attached to each of your holomem.

name: Demonic Sword "Asura"
ability: The holomem this tool is attached to gets Arts+10. ◆Additional ability if attached to <Nakiri Ayame> When the holomem this tool is attached to collabs, if your Life is at 1 and your opponent has no collab holomem, your opponent chooses 1 of their back holomem and moves it to the collab position (Moving is not regarded as collab). Only 1 tool can be attached to each of your holomem.

name: Fingers
ability: The holomem this tool is attached to gets Arts+10. When this tool is attached from hand to your <Inugami Korone>, you may return 1 <Inugami Korone> from your archive to hand. Only 1 tool can be attached to each of your holomem.

name: Chattino
ability: The holomem this mascot is attached to gets +10 HP. ◆Additional ability if attached to a 1st or greater <Raora Panthera> If your Oshi holomem is <Raora Panthera>, the holomem this mascot is attached to gets +20 HP. Only 1 mascot can be attached to each of your holomem.

name: Moonabito
ability: The holomem this mascot is attached to gets +20 HP. ◆Additional ability if attached to <Moona Hoshinova> [1/Turn]When the holomem with this mascot attached deals special damage to your opponent's holomem, you may send 1 blue cheer from your archive to your back holomem. Only 1 mascot can be attached to each of your holomem.

name: Ebifrion
ability: The holomem this mascot is attached to gets +20 HP. ◆Additional ability if attached to <Natsuiro Matsuri> During your opponent's turn, if the holomem this mascot is attached to is downed, you may reattach 1 yellow cheer from this holomem to your other <Natsuiro Matsuri>. Only 1 mascot can be attached to each of your holomem.

name: Matsurisu
ability: If your [Oshi holomem or holomem with #Gen 1] rolled a die by an ability, you may archive this fan:Regard the result of one dice roll as 4. You may only attach this fan to your <Natsuiro Matsuri>, and you may attach any number of this fan per holomem.

name: Subatomo
ability: During your opponent's turn, if the holomem this fan is attached to is downed, send the top card of your cheer deck to your <Oozora Subaru>. You may only attach this fan to your <Oozora Subaru>, and you may attach any number of this fan per holomem.
